ai-chatbot.title: AI Chatbot
ai-chatbot.description: A smart chatbot that can answer visitor questions, capture leads, and guide users through your site automatically.

enhanced-mobile-optimization.title: Enhanced Mobile Optimization
enhanced-mobile-optimization.description: Improves how your site performs and appears on phones and tablets, including faster loading and touch-friendly layouts.

extra-page.title: Extra Page
extra-page.description: Adds one more page to your website, such as an About, Services, or Contact page.

custom-animations.title: Custom Animations
custom-animations.description: Adds polished motion effects to make your website feel more dynamic and engaging.

image-gallery.title: Image Gallery
image-gallery.description: Creates a clean, interactive gallery so you can showcase photos, products, or portfolio work.

logo-design.title: Logo Design
logo-design.description: Includes a custom logo concept tailored to your brand style, colors, and business identity.

appointment-booking.title: Appointment Booking
appointment-booking.description: Adds a booking system so clients can schedule appointments directly from your website.

advanced-seo.title: Advanced SEO
advanced-seo.description: Improves your site’s visibility in search engines with deeper keyword targeting, metadata, and structure improvements.

google-analytics-setup.title: Google Analytics Setup
google-analytics-setup.description: Connects your website to Google Analytics so you can track visitors, traffic sources, and user behavior.

json-file-integration.title: JSON File Integration / Dynamic Website
json-file-integration.description: Lets your site pull content from structured JSON files and supports a more dynamic, updateable experience for your website.

static-website.title: Static Website
static-website.description: A simpler website setup that serves fixed content and is ideal for marketing or informational sites.

dynamic-website.title: Dynamic / Updateable Website
dynamic-website.description: A website that can be updated more easily over time with changing content, features, or data-driven sections.

user-account-system.title: User Account System
user-account-system.description: Adds secure sign-in and account features so visitors can create profiles, save preferences, and access protected content.

no-database.title: No Database
no-database.description: Keeps the website lightweight by avoiding a database layer, which can be ideal for simpler static or content-driven projects.
